question: What numeric value indicates the length of ribbon in the materials list?
Which text is displayed as the main title on the intro screen? A. Tools & Materials B. How To: Ribbon Bow Making C. Arts & Crafts Expert D. Shamrock
What color is the button-up shirt worn by the woman presenting the tutorial? A. Purple B. Pink C. Green D. Blue
What tools and materials are displayed on the surface and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A coiled purple satin ribbon lies in the upper left area of a gray surface. A green plastic ruler with black markings rests diagonally in the lower right corner. A small gold button, tangled red thread, and a silver needle are scattered nearby. White text overlay lists the items as tools and materials including thirty inches of ribbon.

question: How many crafting tools and materials are visible on the gray surface?

Which of the previously seen objects is still being manipulated in the later close-up shots? A. Green plastic ruler with black markings B. Woman with shoulder-length blonde hair and bangs C. Purple satin ribbon, smooth texture D. Red brick wall with light-colored mortar
Did the video feature BOTH an expert named Jenny Jones AND a green ruler in the materials layout? A. Only Jenny Jones named B. Only green ruler shown C. Both Jenny Jones and green ruler D. Neither
Where are the vertical colorful poles located relative to the presenter in the intro sequence? A. On the person's hair B. At the bottom of the screen C. In front of the woman D. Behind the woman
What action is the hand performing with the purple ribbon? A. cutting ribbon B. tying knot C. sewing ribbon D. gluing fabric
Describe the visual sequence from the opening graphics to the display of materials.
canonical_answer: At 0s, vertical colored stripes fill the screen; at 2s, the videojug logo and title appear; at 4s, a woman in a pink shirt peeks through colorful poles; at 6s, a lower-third graphic identifies the speaker; at 18s, tools including a green ruler and purple ribbon are displayed on a surface.

question: Has the needle pierced through the ribbon layers yet?

How has the visual content changed from the intro sequence to the presenter's introduction? A. From a woman to title graphics B. From crafting supplies to a hair bow C. From title graphics to a woman D. From a hair bow to crafting supplies
What specific shape does the purple ribbon form after manipulation?
canonical_answer: It is a light purple satin bow with four loops and two tails.
